- banner:
  - link "Grok"
  - button "New chat"
- main:
  - log:
    - article:
      - text "What is the capital of France?"
    - article:
      - text "The capital of France is Paris."
      - button "Copy"
      - button "Regenerate"
      - button "Good response"
      - button "Bad response"
  - form:
    - textbox "Ask Grok anything"
    - button "Send"
